description_long: This bottle features a cylindrical body with alternating olive green and beige bands, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. Two dark brown horizontal straps encircle the midsection, each fastened with metallic rivets, suggesting reinforcement or decorative detailing. The top of the bottle is capped with a thick, beige lid, which is attached to a metallic ring and a flat, wooden or plastic lever, possibly functioning as a locking or carrying mechanism. The surface finish appears matte, with a slightly grippy texture, and the bottle is constructed primarily from a hard, durable material. A partial black graphic or logo is visible on one side, adding a touch of character. The overall design suggests it is intended for robust, everyday use in urban environments.
description: A rugged, olive green and beige bottle with two dark brown straps, a thick beige cap, and a metallic ring with a lever. The bottle features a partial black graphic and a matte, grippy finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's beige and green bands, two brown straps, and a partial black graphic on the lower section.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the bottle's cylindrical shape, the two brown straps, and the metallic ring and lever on the cap, with no visible graphic.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the brown straps with metallic rivets and a clear view of the lever and ring mechanism on the cap.
description_view_3: This rear view reveals the continuation of the brown straps and a more complete look at the black graphic, with the lever and ring visible from a different angle.
attribute_label_or_branding: Partial black graphic or logo on the lower side of the bottle, visible from the front and rear views.
